author: ImeMine
description: Highlights notes in the file explorer when they have not been modified for a configurable number of days. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ImeMine
manifest.description: Highlights notes in the file explorer when they have not been modified for a configurable number of days.
manifest.name: Note Age Highlighter

name: Note Age Highlighter

releases.author: MeMineoff
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Highlights stale notes in the file explorer
- Configurable threshold in days
- Configurable highlight color
- Instant apply on settings change
releases.name: Note Age Highlighter 1.0.0
